channel.title: AI Daily Brief — Ad-Free (TTS)
channel.itunes:author: Beng (Auto-generated)
channel.description: Ad-free version of The AI Daily Brief podcast. Sponsor reads are stripped from transcripts and audio is regenerated with Edge TTS (Aria Neural voice).

item.title: The Fable 5 Crisis Continues
item.description: The weekend's Anthropic-vs-White House standoff over Fable 5 grinds into Monday with no resolution — dueling press releases, the Amazon jailbreak report, the wellness-retreat meme, and the dawning realization that this fight was never going to be settled by engineers. Original episode: 2026-06-15.

item.title: Fable 5 Shut Down by US Government
item.description: A national-security directive forced Anthropic to abruptly cut off Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all foreign nationals worldwide. Original episode: 2026-06-13.
